ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "match_no" TEXT /* Match number within the series */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "toss" TEXT /* Toss result (e.g., team A won the toss and elected to field) */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match */,
  "player_of_the_match" TEXT /* Player of the match */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_choosen" TEXT /* Choice made by the toss winner (bat or field) */,
  "batting_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batting team */,
  "bowling_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowling team */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "umpire1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  "third_umpire" TEXT /* Name of the third umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_bowling_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowling_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_batting_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("batting_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team logo */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Name of the team's home ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "is_captain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is the captain */,
  "is_wk" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is the wicket-keeper */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL of the player's image */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playing_xi" (
  "playing_xi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playing XI entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the player in the match */,
  "bowling_position" INTEGER /* Bowling position of the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playing_xi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playing_xi_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playing_xi_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playing_xi_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innings" (
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each innings */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "innings_number" INTEGER /* Innings number (1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "batting_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batting team */,
  "bowling_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowling team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the innings */,
  "wickets_fallen" INTEGER /* Total wickets fallen in the innings */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Total overs bowled in the innings */,
  "declared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the innings was declared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("innings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_bowling_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowling_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innings_batting_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("batting_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balls" (
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ball */,
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings */,
  "ball_number" REAL /* Number of the ball in the over (e.g., 19.6) */,
  "commentary_text" TEXT /* Commentary text for the ball */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored from the ball */,
  "extra" INTEGER /* Extra runs (e.g., wides, no-balls) */,
  "ball_length" TEXT /* Length of the ball (e.g., full, back of length) */,
  "ball_line" TEXT /* Line of the ball (e.g., off side, leg side) */,
  "ball_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the ball (e.g., straight, extra cover) */,
  "shot_name" TEXT /* Type of shot played by the batsman */,
  "ball_speed" REAL /* Speed of the ball in km/h */,
  "out_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., caught, bowled) */,
  "fielder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fielder involved in the dismissal (if applicable) */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., lbw, stumped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ball_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_innings_id FOREIGN KEY ("innings_id") REFERENCES innings ("innings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_fielder_id FOREIGN KEY ("fielder_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balls_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overs" (
  "over_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each over */,
  "innings_id" INTEGER /* ID of the innings */,
  "over_number" INTEGER /* Number of the over */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the over */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets fallen in the over */,
  "maiden" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the over was a maiden */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate of the over */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("over_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overs_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overs_innings_id FOREIGN KEY ("innings_id") REFERENCES innings ("innings_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dismissals" (
  "dismissal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dismissal */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ball resulting in the dismissal */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman dismissed */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler taking the wicket */,
  "out_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., caught, bowled) */,
  "fielder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fielder involved in the dismissal (if applicable) */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., lbw, stumped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dismissal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_fielder_id FOREIGN KEY ("fielder_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_ball_id FOREIGN KEY ("ball_id") REFERENCES balls ("ball_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extras" (
  "extra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extra */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ball resulting in the extra */,
  "extra_type" TEXT /* Type of extra (e.g., wide, no-ball) */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of extra runs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extras_ball_id FOREIGN KEY ("ball_id") REFERENCES balls ("ball_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series or tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the season belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a match */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling figures in a match */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs scored per match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate (for batsmen) or economy rate (for bowlers) */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate (for bowlers) */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties (50s) scored */,
  "centuries" INTEGER /* Number of centuries scored */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "umpire_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the umpire */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)
